title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Om Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Om Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
